permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Polls the Acting Intern HUD relay for live patient context, dictation findings, and order verification. Streams G2 mic audio to Deepgram for hands-free dictation.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture audio from the G2 microphones and stream it to Deepgram so the doctor can dictate notes and orders without using a laptop or phone microphone.
